mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BL_ADMIN_AUDIT_LOGS (LOG_ID, ADMIN_ID, ACTION_TYPE, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, BEFORE_VALUE, AFTER_VALUE, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_ADMIN_AUDIT_LOGS.NEXTVAL, #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{beforeValue,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{afterValue,jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE)
